description_long: This filing cabinet features a boxy, rectangular structure with a wood-textured exterior on its main panels and a robust black metal frame forming a visible cross-braced support on the sides and back. The wood panels are smooth and unadorned, giving the cabinet a modern, minimalist appearance. The black metal frame is constructed from cylindrical bars, arranged in an X-pattern for added stability and visual interest. The top of the cabinet is open, revealing the interior, which is likely hollow and designed to accommodate files or documents. There are no visible handles, drawers, or label holders, suggesting a simple drop-in or open-top filing system. The overall design is industrial and contemporary, suitable for urban environments where durability and style are both valued.
description: A modern, open-top filing cabinet with wood-textured panels and a black metal cross-braced frame. The design is minimalist and industrial, with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat, wood-textured panel with no visible handles or openings, framed by the black metal structure.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the black metal cross-bracing and the depth of the wood panel, highlighting the open top and structural frame.
description_view_2: The back view displays the intersecting metal bars in an X-pattern, with the wood panel inset and the open top visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the cross-braced metal frame and the wood panel, emphasizing the cabinet's sturdy construction.
